body #load {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: fixed;
  width: 100%;
  z-index: 9901;
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transition: all .35s ease-out;
}
.load-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  text-align: center;
  display: -ms-flexbox;
  display: -ms-flex;
  display: flex;
  -ms-align-items: center;
  -ms-flex-align: center;
  align-items: center;
  -ms-flex-flow: column wrap;
  flex-flow: column wrap;
  -ms-flex-pack: center;
  -ms-justify-content: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.load-wrap > svg {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%,-50%);
}
#load {
  background: var(--the7-elementor-beautiful-loading-bg,#ffffff);
  --the7-beautiful-spinner-color2: var(--the7-beautiful-spinner-color,#c4c4c4);
}

// Fixes the broken 'Skip to content' link by renaming the target ID
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    var contentArea = document.getElementById('content');
    var skipLink = document.querySelector('a.skip-link');

    // Check if the skip link is pointing to #content and the target element is named something else
    if (contentArea && skipLink && skipLink.getAttribute('href') === '#content') {
        contentArea.id = 'content';
    } else {
        // If the main content area has the ID "content" already, let's look for a better target.
        // For The7, it is often '#main'. We will rename it.
        var mainWrapper = document.getElementById('main');
        if (mainWrapper) {
            mainWrapper.id = 'content';
        }
    }
});

/* Make the text black for accessibility within the Business Hours Indicator table */
table.mabel-bhi-businesshours,
table.mabel-bhi-businesshours th,
table.mabel-bhi-businesshours td,
table.mabel-bhi-businesshours p,
table.mabel-bhi-businesshours span {
    color: #000000 !important; /* Black color */
}

/* If there are links within the table that also need to be black, add this */
table.mabel-bhi-businesshours a {
    color: #000000 !important;
}


 /*added to remove the gray bar above the widget - upcoming events alex CHECK let me know if it affects anything else */


#block-7 {
  background-color: #ffffff;
	background:#ffffff;
  
}


/* Force the bottom bar content to stack vertically on smaller screens */
@media (max-width: 778px) {
    #bottom-bar .wf-container-bottom {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        text-align: center;
    }

    #bottom-bar .wf-float-right,
    #bottom-bar .wf-float-left {
        width: 100%; /* Make each column full width */
        float: none; /* Remove floating behavior */
        margin-bottom: 10px; /* Add some space between stacked elements */
    }

    /* Adjust the logo to be centered on mobile */
    #branding-bottom {
        width: 100%;
        text-align: center;
    }
}



/* Ensure all elements within the shortcode output remain on the same line */
.hours-inline-fix,
.hours-inline-fix p,
.hours-inline-fix div,
.hours-inline-fix span {
    display: inline !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    /* Reset common block element spacing that causes line breaks */
}


/* Custom fix for contrast issues in top bar microwidgets */
#top-bar .mini-widgets a:hover,
#top-bar .mini-widgets .soc-ico a:hover span,
#top-bar .mini-widgets .mini-contacts:hover,
#top-bar .mini-widgets .mini-contacts:hover i {
    color: #FFB81C !important; /* Force to accessible yellow/gold */
}



.promo-image::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4); /* dark overlay for white text */
}


/* Fixes low contrast for hidden, functional text elements in the events bar.
   This targets the visually hidden date picker labels and titles. */

.tribe-events-c-top-bar__datepicker-label,
.tribe-events-c-top-bar__today-button,
.tribe-events-c-top-bar__datepicker-input,
.tribe-events-c-top-bar__datepicker-desktop,
.tribe-events-c-top-bar__nav-link,
.tribe-events-view-loader__text {
    /* Set color to black for maximum contrast against a white background */
    color: #000000 !important;
}



</style>

		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<h2 style="text-align: left;">BRIC Break</h2>
<p style="text-align: left;"><a href="https://www.cpp.edu/maps?id=1130#!m/1070573?share">BRIC (Building 42)</a></p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><div class="mabel-bhi-businesshours-inline"><span class="mbhi-is-current"><span class="mabel-bhi-day">Monday (Summer Break) </span> Closed</span></div>

		</div>
	</div>
<div  class="vc_do_toggle vc_toggle vc_toggle_rounded vc_toggle_color_green  vc_toggle_size_md"><div class="vc_toggle_title"><h3 style="text-align: left" class="vc_custom_heading vc_do_custom_heading" >View Details</h3><i class="vc_toggle_icon"></i></div><div class="vc_toggle_content"><p>A healthy food stand, located inside the Bronco Recreational and Intramural Complex (BRIC), that serves customizable acai bowls, smoothies, and other healthy snacks like protein bars to students and visitors. It provides a convenient and affordable option for a healthy pick-me-up, with service windows both inside the BRIC and outside at the front and on the pool deck</p>
</div></div><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 10px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1757710032595"><div class="wpb_wrapper"></div></div></div><div class="wpb_column vc_column_container vc_col-sm-4"><div class="vc_column-inner vc_custom_1757710026798"><div class="wpb_wrapper"><div class="vc_empty_space"   style="height: 10px"><span class="vc_empty_space_inner"></span></div>

<p style="text-align: left;">Student Services Building Breezeway (Building 121)</p>
<p style="text-align: left;"><div class="mabel-bhi-businesshours-inline"><span class="mbhi-is-current"><span class="mabel-bhi-day">Monday (Summer Break) </span> Closed</span></div>

<div  class="vc_do_toggle vc_toggle vc_toggle_rounded vc_toggle_color_green  vc_toggle_size_md"><div class="vc_toggle_title"><h3 style="text-align: left" class="vc_custom_heading vc_do_custom_heading" >View Details</h3><i class="vc_toggle_icon"></i></div><div class="vc_toggle_content"><p>Launched in 2023 as the “baby” of the main Poly Trolley 2 food truck, the Poly Trolley Express provides faster service with a smaller menu in a convenient location at the Student Services Building breezeway.
